leftPanel.heading: Manage Your Properties with Ease
leftPanel.description: Access your broker dashboard to list properties, manage inquiries, and grow your real estate business.

signUp.title: Create your platform

signUp.brandingDescription: Customize your homepage background and platform icon. Available on Plus, Pro, and Ultra plans — your branding will go live once you upgrade.

toasts.emailTakenDescription: An account with this email already exists.

toasts.brandingUploadFailedDescription: Your account was created, but we couldn't upload your images. You can add them later in Settings.
